title: Finite Aitken Acceleration Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Aitken bad accelerated value QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact rational Aitken replay for the geometric-error row [2, 3/2, 5/4] computes aitken_value = 1, while a malformed row claims aitken_value = 3/2, isolating a compact scalar equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional sequence-acceleration rows only when they add distinct denominator-safety, convergence-rate, fixed-point, extrapolation, floating-point, or theorem-reconstruction pressure; keep general Aitken acceleration theory and stability claims in future Lean or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed source terms, first differences, second difference, correction, accelerated value, and residuals as deterministic rational replay obligations.
Route the false accelerated value through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the exact value.
Expose the pack through sequence-tail, exact-vs-floating, bounded theorem-shadow, real-analysis, numerical-analysis, and learner query surfaces.

Keep general Aitken convergence acceleration, convergence-order improvement, nonzero-denominator preconditions, floating-point implementation correctness, and numerical-stability claims marked as future Lean or numerical-honesty work until formal routes exist.
